ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_display_name" TEXT /* Human-readable name of the product */,
  "string_id" TEXT /* String identifier for the product */,
  "guid" TEXT /* Globally Unique Identifier (GUID) for the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Status of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  "licensed_users" INTEGER /* Number of licensed users for the product */,
  "license_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the product's license expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_plans" (
  "service_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service plan */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the service plan is associated with */,
  "service_plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the service plan */,
  "service_plan_guid" TEXT /* Globally Unique Identifier (GUID) for the service plan */,
  "service_plans_included_friendly_names" TEXT /* User-friendly names of the service plans included in the product */,
  "service_plan_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the service plan */,
  "service_plan_status" TEXT /* Status of the service plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service plan was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service plan was last updated */,
  "license_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the service plan's license expires */,
  "service_plan_type" TEXT /* Type of the service plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_plans_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role-permission relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role-permission relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
